videoSnippet.title: History is Made! || Veselin Topalov vs Yağız Kaan Erdoğmuş || Clash of Generations III G5
videoSnippet.description:
Download Lotus Chess Here! https://onelink.to/lotus-agadmator https://tournament.lotus-chess.com/tournaments
Search all my videos easy https://agadmator-library.github.io/

Topalov, Veselin (2717) - Erdogmus, Yagiz Kaan (2687)
Topalov vs. Erdogmus: Clash of Generations III (Chess.com) [05] 2026.04.16
B12 Caro-Kann, advance variation

1.e4 c6 2.d4 d5 3.e5 Bf5 4.Nf3 e6 5.Be2 a6 6.O-O c5 7.Be3 cxd4 8.Nxd4 Ne7 9.f4 h5 10.Nd2 Nbc6 11.Nxf5 Nxf5 12.Bf2 g6 13.Bd3 Rc8 14.a3 Be7 15.Rc1 b5 16.b4 Nh6 17.h3 Nf5 18.Kh2 h4 19.Nf3 Ng3 20.Re1 g5 21.Qd2 Rg8 22.c3 gxf4 23.Rc2 Qc7 24.a4 bxa4 25.Ra2 d4 26.Nxd4 Nxe5 27.Bxa6 f3 28.Bb5+ Nd7 29.Kg1 Ne2+ 30.Nxe2 Rxg2+ 31.Kf1 Rxf2+ 32.Kxf2 Qh2+ 33.Kxf3 Qxh3+ 34.Kf2 Qf5+ 35.Qf4 Qxb5 36.Rg1 Nf6 37.Qf3 Qc4 38.Rxa4 Ne4+ 39.Ke1 Ng5 40.Qb7 Rc7 41.Qa8+ Rc8 42.Rg4 Qc7 43.Qh1 h3 44.Ra5 f5 45.Rxg5 Bxg5 46.Qxh3 Bf6 47.Kf1 Rd8 48.Ra6 Qc4 49.Qh5+ Kf8 50.Qh6+ Bg7 51.Qxe6 Rd1+ 52.Kg2 Qg4+ 53.Kh2 Qh4+ 54.Kg2 Qh1+ 55.Kf2 Qh2+ 56.Ke3 Qh3+ 57.Kf2 Rf1#
